analysis.name: Bless
analysis.summary: BLESS近期因DePIN叙事和Binance Alpha关注度上涨，但团队此前抛售导致暴跌，基本面尚可但供应量大，短期涨幅已高，风险较大。

recommendation.invalidation: 若跌破0.007美元或出现团队/大户抛售迹象，则逻辑失效

catalysts: 社区空投活动可能吸引新用户

latestNews.title: Can BLESS Coin Reach $1 in 2026? Price Outlook - WEEX
BLESS (BLESS) sees 51.8% volatility in 24 hours: Team's sale of 300 million tokens triggers sharp drop - Bitget
latestNews.reason: 高波动性及团队抛售，风险警示

fundamentals: Bless Network是去中心化计算平台，利用闲置设备算力，属于DePIN赛道
项目前身Blockless，2022年成立，总部旧金山
总供应量100亿，流通18.4亿，流通市值约1537万美元，FDV约8348万美元
代币用途：支付网络计算资源、节点质押等
marketRead: 24小时涨幅25%，7天涨幅49%，14天涨幅92%，短期涨幅巨大
成交量654万美元，相对市值较高，换手率约42%，交易活跃
价格距历史高点0.218美元下跌96%，当前处于低位反弹
risks: 团队此前抛售3000万枚代币，存在继续抛售风险
总供应量极大，解锁压力未知
DePIN赛道竞争激烈，项目差异化不明显
新闻多为旧闻，缺乏近期实质性利好
价格波动剧烈，流动性风险
watchlist: 团队钱包动向及链上大额转账
项目方公布新合作或产品进展
sourceNotes: 数据来源CoinGecko，新闻来源Google News聚合，部分新闻日期较早
Binance API因地区限制无法获取实时行情，价格数据来自CoinGecko
团队抛售事件发生在2026年4月，距今2个月，影响可能已部分消化

profile.name: Bless
profile.description: Bless Network is a decentralized computing platform designed to transform idle capacity from everyday devices into a global shared computer. Founded in SanFrancisco, USA, under the name Blockless in 2022. By leveraging laptops, desktops, and mobile devices, Bless enables applications to access distributed computing resources directly from their user base. As moreusers join, the available network capacity scales proportionally, creating a self-sustaining infrastructure layer. The network is built on its neutral application framework (nnApp) and nested node infrastructure, which allow developers to deploy compute-intensive applicationsacross heterogeneous devices. This model reduces dependence on centralized cloud providers, a common bottleneck for decentralized ecosystems.
